allow: Bash(python -c "from PIL import Image, ImageDraw, ImageFont; img = Image.new\(''PNG'', \(64, 64\), color=''#1E88E5''\); draw = ImageDraw.Draw\(img\); draw.text\(\(20, 20\), ''BTC'', fill=''white'', font=ImageFont.truetype\(''arial.ttf'', 32\) if __import__\(''os''\).path.exists\(''arial.ttf''\) else None\); img.save\(''docs/assets/images/favicon.png''\)")

Bash(echo "<svg xmlns=''http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'' viewBox=''0 0 64 64''><rect fill=''#FF6F00'' width=''64'' height=''64''/><text x=''32'' y=''40'' font-family=''Arial'' font-size=''32'' font-weight=''bold'' fill=''white'' text-anchor=''middle''>₿</text></svg>")
